titleStmt.title: SII 38.555: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 555. (A.R. No. 555 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the west wall, Nīrvaṇṇar shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Māṟavarman Tribhuvanachchakkravartti Kulaśēkhara Year 37: Kaṟkaṭaka, śu. di. 5, Wednesday, uttiram = 8th July 1304 A.D.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription records the assignment of the village Vaḍakkuppaṭṭu with all its appurtenances, after changing its name, Kumāragōpālanallūr, after his name (nam pērāle) to the god Nakka-nāyanar, of the temple at Pammal in Surattūrnāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻamaṇḍalam by Pañchanadivāṇaṉ Tiruvēgambaṉ alias Nīlagaṅgaṉ. It is stated that the latter assigned this village to the god for celebrating the day of his natal star Hasta in the month of Paṅguni. It is further mentioned that the ceded village was purchased, from the people (who were called) Neḍuṅkaṇṇagaḷ and Vaḷḷaikāppugaḷ, who resided at Perumpākkam alias Rājarājanallūr in Kāvāy-nāḍu by a certain Tirukkāḷatti-uḍaiyāṉ alias Narasiṅgapaṉmaṉ, one of the agampaḍiyās of Kūttampākkam, who in turn made over to the donor Pañchanadivāṇaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmar tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 7vatu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu(ṉa)nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattup puliyūrkoṭṭamāṉa kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu curattūrnāṭṭu pammalil
Uṭaiyār pammanakkanāyaṉār(ṟa)ku pañcanativāṇaṉ tiruvekampaṉāṉa nilakaṅkaṉeṉ Uṭaiyār pammanakkanāyaṉārkku tiruppaṅkuṉi mātam nam jaṉmanakṣatramāṉa Attattile tittamāka Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tirunāḷpaṭikku Immaṇṭalattu Ikkoṭṭattu kālvāynāṭṭu perumpākkamāṉa Irā
ca Irācanallūr vaḷḷaikkāppukaḷum neṭuṅkaṇṇakaḷum pakkal kuttaṉpākkattil Akampaṭiyāril tirukkāḷattiuṭaiyāṉāṉa naraciṅkapaṉmaṉ koṇṭuṭaiya vaṭakkuppaṭṭukku namperāle kumārakopālanallūr Eṉṟu perāvatākavum Ivūrkku Ellai Āvatu
kiḻppārkellai verunūr melpāṟkellaikku meṟku vaṭakku nokkip pokiṟa Eṅkālukku meṟkum tenpārkellai tuṟkaippaṭṭiyeṉṟum vaṭukaṉeṉṟum peruṭaiya ceykaḷil vaṭavarampil kiḻakku tokkip pokiṟa vaṭukameṉ
ṟu peruṭaiya Ikkālamum mulacceṟuvaiyum Eḻumūrk kuṇṭilaiyum naṭuvuṟappiḷantu kiḻakku nokkippoy Eṅkāluṟṟa cevvaikku vaṭakkum Iṉṉum Iverikarai Ūṭaṟuttu Iccevvai maṇṭimaṉ kāraṇai Uṟṟa cevvaikku vaṭakkum maṇṭimaṉ kāraṇaiyil kiḻpāṟ
kellaikkuk kiḻakkum Iṉṉum moṭaipākkattuk kiḻpāṟkellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Immoṭaipākkattil Ellai kiḻakkut tirinta tenpāṟkellaikku teṟkum Iṉṉum paḷḷikaḷ kāraṇaiyil tenpāṟkellaikku teṟkum
Āka Inṉāṟpāṟkellaikku mikutik kuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅkiṉa �ṟum kollai nilamum nattamum maṉaiyum paṭappaḻa maṉṟuṅ kaṉṟu nilaipāḻum maramum kiṇaṟum nirum niroṭukālum potuvum potāriyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa cakalappiṟāttikaḷum vuṭpa
ṭa Ittirukkāḷatti Uṭaiyāṉāṉa naraciṅkapaṉmaṉ koṇṭa Ivūril ṉāṟpāṟ kellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil
Digital edition of SII 38.555 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
